desc: Self-teaching system: wire existing components (CheckpointManager, metrics), implement spec-conformance validation, enable LLM pattern learning. Foundation for self-compounding architecture.

phase-0-start.desc: Foundation: Establish agent self-orientation. Update CLAUDE.md with architecture guide so agents understand system without handholding.

enrich-claude-md.desc: Add AGENT_GUIDE section to .claude/CLAUDE.md: 6 layers, gap intents, existing resources (CheckpointManager, trail, gitsafe), integration patterns from branches, quick reference mapping.

phase-1-start.desc: Parallel phase: Wire existing systems. High leverage, low effort. Unlocks audit trail + metrics for downstream work.

integrate-checkpoint-manager.desc: Wire CheckpointManager (recovery.ts) into roadmap runtime. Hook into complete() to create snapshots, record decisions, enable rollback.

extract-metrics-from-trail.desc: Parse .roadmap/trail.jsonl retrospectively. Compute SLO metrics (execution time, success rate, validator hits, completion velocity) from existing data. Zero instrumentation cost.

extend-gitsafe-multirepo.desc: Extend gitsafe-loader.ts to support N repositories instead of single repo. Update glob patterns, enforce consistency across all repos.

phase-2-start.desc: Parallel phase: Implement spec-conformance validation. Depends on phase 1 audit trail + metrics foundation.

implement-spec-conformance-validator.desc: Build spec-conformance validator: scenario (Given/When/Then) -> node mapping engine. Validate DAGs against scenarios. Feed failures into audit trail.

integrate-llm-feedback-loop.desc: Parse metrics + audit trail -> LLM-friendly feedback. Generate improvement prompts for agent iterations. Wire into agent brief generation.

phase-3-start.desc: Scale phase: Enable distributed DAG state. Multi-repo support enables cross-project pattern mining.

implement-distributed-dag.desc: Extend core protocol for multi-repo DAG state. Support merging DAGs from multiple repositories. Aggregate patterns across projects for LLM learning.

self-teaching-enabled.desc: Self-teaching architecture complete: metrics visible, spec-conformance testable, audit trail recorded, patterns emerge from cross-project DAGs. LLM learns to generate better DAGs.
